name: Thunderous Greatclub
description: While you are attuned to this magic weapon, your Strength is 20 unless your Strength is already equal to or greater than that score.

strength_bonus.condition: Only if not already 20 or higher

extra_damage.creatures: 1d8 Thunder damage to any creature hit
extra_damage.objects: 3d8 Thunder damage to objects not worn/carried

clap_of_thunder.sound: Loud clap audible out to 300 feet
clap_of_thunder.object_damage: Nonmagical objects not worn/carried take 3d8 Thunder damage

earthquake.structure_damage: Structures in contact with ground take 50 Bludgeoning damage

concentration_check.effect: Break Concentration if also concentrating and fail save

earthquake.structure_collapse: Structures on fissure spots collapse into it
